---
title: "UNet-NILM: A deep neural network for multi-tasks appliances state detection and power estimation in NILM"
date: 2020-11-18
authors: "<strong>Anthony Faustine</strong> and Pereira, Lucas and Bousbiat, Hafsa and Kulkarni, Shridhar"

categories:
  - nilm
  - deep learning
  - appliance detection
  - energy disaggregation
  - multi-task learning

thumbnail: "/images/publications/MLABEL.svg"
image: "/images/publications/MLABEL.svg"

conference: "5th International Workshop on Non-Intrusive Appliance Load Monitoring (NILM), BuildSys 2020, Virtual"

abstract: |
  Non-Intrusive Load Monitoring (NILM) is the task of decomposing aggregate power consumption into individual appliance-level signals. Existing deep learning approaches for NILM typically address either appliance state detection or power estimation as separate tasks, limiting their practical utility. This paper proposes UNet-NILM, a multi-task deep neural network architecture inspired by the U-Net encoder-decoder design for semantic segmentation. UNet-NILM simultaneously detects appliance ON/OFF states and estimates per-appliance active power consumption from aggregate mains readings. We evaluate the approach on the UK-DALE and REFIT datasets across five target appliances. Results show that UNet-NILM achieves state-of-the-art performance on both tasks simultaneously, demonstrating that joint optimisation of detection and estimation objectives is mutually beneficial. The proposed architecture offers a practical step toward deployable NILM systems that provide both appliance status and fine-grained energy consumption data.

description: |
  UNet-NILM proposes a multi-task U-Net inspired architecture for simultaneous appliance state detection and power estimation in non-intrusive load monitoring, achieving state-of-the-art results on UK-DALE and REFIT datasets.

pub-info:
  links:
    - name: PDF
      url: "../../files/papers/UNetNILM.pdf"
      icon: file-earmark-pdf
    - name: Link
      url: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3427773.3427866"
      icon: journal-text
    - name: Code
      url: "https://github.com/sambaiga/UNETNiLM"
      icon: github
  reference: |
    <strong>Anthony Faustine</strong>, Pereira, Lucas, Bousbiat, Hafsa and Kulkarni, Shridhar,
    "UNet-NILM: A deep neural network for multi-tasks appliances state detection and power
    estimation in NILM," <em>Proceedings of the 5th International Workshop on Non-Intrusive
    Appliance Load Monitoring, BuildSys 2020, Virtual Event,</em> 2020, doi:
    <a href="https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3427773.3427866"><code>10.1145/3427773.3427866</code></a>

status: Published
featured: false
doi: "10.1145/3427773.3427866"

author:
  - name: Anthony Faustine
    orcid: 0000-0002-7838-533X
    affiliation: ITI, LARSyS, Técnico Lisboa, 1049-001 Lisboa, Portugal
  - name: Pereira, Lucas
    orcid: 0000-0002-9110-8775
    affiliation: ITI, LARSyS, Técnico Lisboa, 1049-001 Lisboa, Portugal
  - name: Bousbiat, Hafsa
    affiliation: Graz University of Technology, Graz, Austria
  - name: Kulkarni, Shridhar
    affiliation: Graz University of Technology, Graz, Austria
---
